item.name: Get Promo Code By Code String
Get Promo Code by Code String

body.raw:
{
  "restaurantId": "65ac12345678abcdef000001",
  "dealType": "TWO_FOR_ONE",
  "title": "2 for 1 Pizza Night",
  "description": "Buy one premium pizza, get one free on Friday dinner!",
  "day": "FRIDAY",
  "mealTime": "DINNER",
  "start": "18:00",
  "end": "22:00",
  "maxClaimsPerDay": 50,
  "isActive": true,
  "twoForOne": {
    "appliesTo": "MAIN_COURSE"
  }
}
